subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! I am a handmaiden from among Thy handmaidens and a leaf from among the leaves of the tree of Thy love, who hath turned her face toward the orient [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی امه من امائک و ورقه من اوراق شجره محبتک قد توجهت الی مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
